uplink.description: Port 1 Device Information Payload (vendor worked example 4D 0F 42 86 64 00 0A 2B 11 7E 05): 26.03C, 44.78% RH, 3.906V, region EU868. Note: byte0 0x4D decodes to 77% per the byte layout and the official MOKO decoder (bytes[0]+'%'); the manual's annotation '100%' is a copy error in the document.
Port 2 Beacon Payload: BLE scan list (header 0x20, 1 beacon, MAC B1 FA 1E 36 EF 03 per vendor MAC example) carries proximity data, not a vocabulary-mappable coordinate fix; expect an error.

errors: beacon scan carries no vocabulary-mappable measurement

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort 5 yields an error result.
